summary: Pricing Margin Fix Verified - All 13 backend tests PASSED. Admin margins (10% CMT, 10% fabric, 5% styling) are correctly applied per-reseller by looking up reseller_settings by 'reseller_id' (email). Reseller margins (150%) are applied on top. Customer Price = Base × (1 + Admin Margin%) × (1 + Reseller Margin%). Frontend login and settings pages work correctly.

issues: PostHog and Cloudflare Insights scripts blocked by CSP - not critical, affects analytics only

critical_code_review_comments: pricing.py line 576: Correctly looks up reseller_settings by reseller_id matching email
pricing.py lines 581-584: Reseller margins extracted from settings_margins dict correctly
pricing.py lines 695-698: Customer price calculation applies reseller margin on top of reseller cost
ResellerSettingsPage.jsx line 40: Uses user.email as resellerId instead of hardcoded 'default'
StylingPage.jsx line 73: Uses user.email as resellerId for price calculation
seed_data_creation: None required - existing test data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing margin fix verified. Key change: pricing.py now looks up reseller_settings by 'reseller_id' (which stores the reseller's email) instead of 'reseller_email'. Frontend pages use user.email as resellerId. Admin margins are in reseller_pricing collection, reseller margins are in reseller_settings collection.

features_tested.price_calculation_breakdown: PASS - Breakdown shows admin_margin_percent and reseller_margin_percent
features_tested.frontend_settings_page: PASS - Shows margin inputs with values 150%
features_tested.frontend_pricing_display: PASS - Example calculation shows margin applied

pricing_verification.test_case: Styling total = 100, Admin margin = 5%, Reseller margin = 150%
